title: ClickFix Fake CAPTCHA PowerShell Execution
description: Detects browser-launched PowerShell patterns associated with ClickFix fake CAPTCHA social engineering, including clipboard instructions, hidden execution, and download cradles.
query: (('Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs') and 'Event ID' = '1' and ('Parent Process Name' like '*chrome.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*msedge.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*firefox.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*iexplore.exe') and 'Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*ClickFix*' or 'Command Line' like '*fake CAPTCHA*' or 'Command Line' like '*clipboard*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-WebRequest*' or 'Command Line' like '*iwr*' or 'Command Line' like '*WindowStyle Hidden*')) or (('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4688' and 'Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*ClickFix*' or 'Command Line' like '*fake CAPTCHA*' or 'Command Line' like '*clipboard*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-WebRequest*' or 'Command Line' like '*iwr*')) or ('Log Source' = 'Windows PowerShell Operational Logs' and 'Event ID' in ('4103', '4104') and ('Script Block Text' like '*ClickFix*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*fake CAPTCHA*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*clipboard*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*DownloadString*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*Invoke-WebRequest*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*iwr*' or 'Host Application' like '*WindowStyle Hidden*')) | stats count as Hits, unique('Command Line') as Commands, unique('Parent Process Name') as Parents by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, User | sort -Hits
falsepositives: Security awareness simulations and browser-delivered helpdesk scripts

references.name: Microsoft Security Blog: Think before you ClickFix
